_comment: EXAMPLE of the EXTERNAL prod config the API reads (default path C:\fedprospector\config\fedprospector.local.json, override via FEDPROSPECTOR_CONFIG). This file lives OUTSIDE the repo so deploy.ps1 can never overwrite it. Normally generated/merged by scripts\generate-selfsigned-cert.ps1. NOTE: there is intentionally NO Jwt section — the JWT secret is supplied via the Jwt__SecretKey environment variable.
